subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-26
subcodes.first_line: It is mentioned in the Tablets of the Blessed Beauty. It is recorded in the Book of the Covenant and in the explicit texts of the Kitáb-i-Aqdas. Clearly He says
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @contention and conflict, @love and unity, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
